Our Services

Professional services across Cape Town and surrounding areas

Call Now WhatsApp Us
6+ Years Serving Cape Town

Our Services

Professional plumbers in Cape Town and surrounding areas. Quality workmanship, fair pricing.

Residential Leak Detection

Hidden leaks in your home waste water, damage structures, and drive up your municipal bill. We use non-invasive detection technology to find the exact source — under floors, behind walls, or beneath slabs — and fix it with minimal disruption.

Learn More

Commercial Leak Detection

A water leak on a commercial property means downtime, property damage, and inflated water costs. We work efficiently across retail, office, and hospitality environments to detect and resolve leaks with minimal disruption to your operations.

Learn More

Industrial Leak Detection

Industrial plumbing systems run under high pressure across complex pipe networks. We use advanced leak detection methods to identify failures in industrial pipelines, process lines, and water reticulation systems — quickly and accurately.

Learn More

Pool Leak Detection

Losing water in your pool isn't always evaporation. A structural crack or failing fitting can waste thousands of litres a month. We use specialist techniques to find exactly where your pool is leaking — without draining it unnecessarily.

Learn More

Geyser Repairs

A faulty geyser means cold showers, water damage, and rising electricity costs. We diagnose and repair geyser faults quickly — from element and thermostat replacements to pressure valve failures and burst geysers.

Learn More

Geyser Installations

Replacing an old geyser or upgrading to a more efficient unit? We handle full geyser installations across Cape Town — including standard electrical geysers and heat pump systems — correctly sized, correctly installed, and fully compliant.

Learn More

Get In Touch Today

Contact Core Leak Detection now for fast, professional service. We respond quickly to all enquiries.
